description_long: This is a tactical fixed-blade knife with a matte black finish, featuring a robust, single-edged blade with a pronounced serrated section along the spine. The blade is thick and tapers to a sharp point, designed for both cutting and sawing tasks. The handle is ergonomically contoured with finger grooves for a secure grip, and it appears to be made of a textured synthetic material, possibly reinforced polymer or G10. There are visible fasteners along the handle, and a lanyard hole at the end with a short cord attached. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The knife is compact and sturdy, suitable for heavy-duty urban or outdoor use.
description: A matte black tactical knife with a serrated spine, contoured ergonomic handle, and lanyard cord, built for utility and durability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blade, serrated spine, and contoured handle with visible fasteners and lanyard cord.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow profile of the blade and handle, with the lanyard cord visible at the end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's serrations, handle contours, and attachment points for the handle scales.
description_view_3: Edge-on view emphasizing the thickness of the blade and handle, as well as the alignment of the serrations.
attribute_handle_design: ergonomic, contoured, textured synthetic with finger grooves and lanyard hole
